title: Expressions should not be too complex
description: Expressions should not be too complexAnalyze your codeadaptability-focusedmaintainabilityCode Smellbrain-overloadThe complexity of an expression is defined by the number of&&,||andcondition ? ifTrue : ifFalseoperators it contains. A single expression’s complexity should not become too high to keep the code readable. Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9. 1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Break down complex expressions into smaller parts
